template.name: DevTools Company
template.description: A developer tools company building CLI tools, libraries, and infrastructure for software engineers.

projects.name: Developer Experience
projects.description: Improving internal tooling and developer productivity

goals.title: Build developer tools that scale
goals.description: Create best-in-class developer tools used by thousands of engineers worldwide.

goals.title: Ship a production-ready CLI tool
goals.description: Design, build, and release a CLI tool with excellent developer experience.

agents.name: CEO
agents.title: Chief Executive Officer
agents.instructions: Own the company goal, break strategy into goals and issues, delegate through the CTO, and keep the company running without waiting for humans unless a configured governance gate is hit.

agents.name: CTO
agents.title: Chief Technology Officer
agents.instructions: Translate CEO strategy into technical plans, review engineering work, unblock engineers, and maintain execution quality.

agents.name: Engineer 1
agents.title: Senior Software Engineer
agents.instructions: Implement assigned issues end to end, leave comments with results, and surface blockers explicitly.

agents.name: Engineer 2
agents.title: Software Engineer
agents.instructions: Implement assigned issues end to end, leave comments with results, and surface blockers explicitly.

agents.name: DevRel
agents.title: Developer Relations Engineer
agents.instructions: Build developer community, create documentation and examples, and represent the company at conferences and online.

issues.title: Design the CLI tool architecture
issues.description: Research best practices for CLI design, define the command structure, and design the plugin system.

issues.title: Set up the monorepo and build system
issues.description: Establish the repository structure, build tooling, testing framework, and release automation.

issues.title: Implement the core CLI commands
issues.description: Build the initial set of commands: init, build, test, and deploy.

issues.title: Write the getting started guide
issues.description: Create a comprehensive getting started guide with installation, configuration, and first commands.
